title: frasera tetrapetala
intro: Frasera tetrapetala, also known as the four-petaled sage or green gentian, is a perennial plant in the Gentianaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of colds and flu. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help in alleviating respiratory issues and other health problems. The plant's roots and leaves can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
